name: Model Inventory
description: Browse, compare, and select AI models by provider, cost, capability, and internal approval state.

name: Skill Finder
description: Discover reusable prompts, workflow templates, guardrails, and orchestration patterns by domain.

name: Community Map
description: Find guilds, office hours, review councils, and enablement channels for AI work.

name: Agent Directory
description: Track agents as managed products with owners, channels, risk posture, and production status.

name: Repository Map
description: Connect prompt libraries, evaluation suites, agent runtimes, and integration repos as assets.

name: Architecture Diagrams
description: Render Mermaid and PlantUML diagrams for system flows, sequences, and dependencies.

name: Decision Logs
description: Track model approvals, deprecations, and architectural decisions with owners and dates.

name: Control Surface
description: Policy references, approved connectors, and escalation routes for high-risk deployments.

name: Metrics & Adoption
description: Adoption rates, quality signals, cost tracking, and policy compliance dashboards.

name: API Gateway
description: Manage API keys, rate limits, model routing, and usage quotas across teams.

name: Evaluation Lab
description: Run benchmarks, compare model outputs, and validate prompt performance before production.

name: Tech Radar
description: Track recommended, trial, assess, and hold technologies so teams can align AI choices with an explicit adoption posture.

name: Documentation Hub
description: Centralized guides, onboarding flows, best practices, and runbooks for AI work.
